what_it_does: Stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for an image attachment tied to the design-source channel, pointing at pitch-deck image p-07.
observations: Only YAML frontmatter is present; there is no prose body
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is recorded
standouts: Target URI uses an image:// scheme to address a pitch-deck asset
The file is purely a metadata stub with no content beyond frontmatter
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
References channel-local assets via a custom image:// URI
notes: A channel-memory stub that registers an image attachment for pitch-deck slide p-07 in the design-source channel.
questions: What is the actual asset behind image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-07?
What does the design-source channel contain beyond this attachment?
Are there other attachment_types besides images?
intention_signals: To create a stable, discoverable record that links a channel to a specific image asset (a pitch-deck slide) for design-source context.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme used to locate a pitch-deck asset within a channel namespace.
contribution: A persistent attachment record that maps a UUID to a channel, attachment type, and image target, supporting traceability of design-source pitch-deck assets.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record in the design-source channel linking att-55bd87ea to the image target image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-07.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image attachment for a pitch-deck slide in the design-source channel with a stable identifier and timestamp.
